1_instruction_adherence.rationale: Every SKILL.md section executed. All required frontmatter fields present in all 11 character files (protagonist, 6 major, 4 minor). relationships.md has full matrix with all pairings filled, key-relationship deep-dives, and network diagram. Iron laws satisfied: 一人一卡 (each character in own file), voice_profile required on all majors, 去重原则 (relationships doesn't duplicate character profiles).

2_output_completeness.rationale: All required output sections produced: protagonist.md (1), major/*.md (6: 被救少女, 老政委, 列塔尼亚代表, 买办代表, 涅普敦将领, 前穿越者遗存代表), minor/*.md (4: 催收员, 地下联络员, 工友老陈, 灵能贵族代表), relationships.md (1). Total 12 files, none missing.

3_voice_distinctness.rationale: Each major character has unmistakably unique speech markers. Interchangeability test: 老政委's question-driven Socratic style vs 纪师's fact-stating historical-referencing style are clearly different; 拉图尔's calm academic euphemism vs 滕贵生's three-register code-switching (fawning/arrogant/drunken) are irreconcilable; 阿莲's short-sentence + '对不起' tic is singular; 格鲁斯塔夫's military-imperative syntax vs 林烽's analytical-humorous digressions cannot be swapped. Minor deduction: some speech_pattern descriptions are more narrative/psychological than concrete pattern definitions (e.g., some describe internal state rather than observable speech markers).

4_arc_definition.rationale: Protagonist has fully defined arc: arc_starting (modern cynic using wit as armor, wanting money and comfort), arc_turning (witnesses airstrike massacre + learns 梵光's catastrophic failure — two triggers that collapse his cynicism), arc_ending (mature revolutionary who fades into the crowd — '功成不必在我'). Arc further developed into 3-act structure with clear cause-effect chains. No missing arc components.

5_motivation_depth.rationale: Surface goals AND deep motivations are explicit for all 11 characters. Protagonist: surface = get rich and live easy, deep = end the cycle of oppression and build civilizational common destiny. Each major: 阿莲 (surface: repay debt/survive, deep: protect brother), 老政委 (surface: guide 林烽, deep: see people rise again), 拉图尔 (surface: maintain colonial order, deep: validate his life's intellectual foundation), 滕贵生 (surface: climb colonial hierarchy, deep: be seen as a 'real civilized person'), 格鲁斯塔夫 (surface: conquer, deep: prove Neptun people aren't inferior), 纪师 (surface: preserve documents, deep: prove the sacrifices weren't meaningless). All minor characters also have both layers. Deep motivations are psychologically specific, never generic.

6_minor_character_respect.rationale: All 4 minor characters have independent agency and motivation. 催收员: has own fear (becoming the people he collects from), owns an internal justification system, has a possible future (unemployed in soup line — mirror to 林烽). 地下联络员: rich backstory (joined from gratitude, evolved into belief), personal fear (torture/network exposure), independent end-choice (refuses office, goes to archives). 工友老陈: personal goal (save son from mines), deep motivation (prove he's not worthless to his son), dies speaking his own last words about his son — not about the protagonist. 灵能贵族代表: self-justification system, specific fears (庶民识字), three possible endings. None exist solely to serve the protagonist's arc. Minor deduction: 灵能贵族代表's actual name is TBD in the profile.

7_relationship_coherence.rationale: Relationship matrix fully consistent with all individual character profiles. Cross-verified every major pairing: 林烽↔老政委 (M/E 思想导师 — confirmed in both profiles), 林烽↔阿莲 (E 拯救者→被拯救者反转 — confirmed in both), 格鲁斯塔夫↔拉图尔 (工具与使用者 — confirmed in both), 滕贵生↔拉图尔 (谄媚依附 — confirmed in both), 纪师↔老政委 (互补双翼 — confirmed in both). The shared catchphrase '火种还在' between 老政委 and 纪师 with different tonal meanings is noted and respected in profiles. No contradictions found across any character pair. Matrix is comprehensive (7x7 with all cells filled). Key-relationship deep-dives cover the 6 most significant pairs. Minor deduction: minor characters (催收员, 联络员, 老陈, 贵族) don't have dedicated rows in the matrix, only appear as references in major-character cells.

8_voice_profile_operability.rationale: Voice profiles provide specific, auditable patterns for downstream skills. Measurable/checkable markers include: 阿莲's sentence-length constraint (≤10 chars), 老政委's question-to-statement ratio, 拉图尔's untranslated-technical-term frequency, 格鲁斯塔夫's imperative-sentence ratio, 纪师's avoidance of positive adjectives. Catchphrases are all specific strings with usage-context notes (not just listed). Avoid_patterns provide negative checks (what should NOT appear in dialogue). Minor deduction: some pattern descriptions are narrative rather than prescriptive (e.g., 林烽's '自言自语时自带理工科吐槽模式' describes a vibe more than a checkable rule). Overall, an auditor could build concrete checks for ~85% of the patterns listed.

9_fear_weakness_grounding.rationale: Every one of the 11 characters has explicit, specific fears. No generic fears (e.g., 'fear of death'). Protagonist: two layered fears (losing conscience + repeating 梵光). 阿莲: three specific fears (brother to mine, abusers finding her, dying before saying thanks). 老政委: fear of 林烽 repeating 梵光's three specific errors (脱离群众, 个人崇拜, 照搬经验). 拉图尔: fear that his civilization is on the wrong side of history. 滕贵生: fear of revolution + being discarded by Letaniya + daughter's future (only selfless fear). 格鲁斯塔夫: fear his life is meaningless (Letaniya's tool). 纪师: fear of becoming dogmatic himself. All 4 minors also have explicit fears that tie directly to their character cores. Fears are psychologically specific, tied to character values, and range from existential to concrete.

summary: Exceptional generative output. All 11 characters have distinct voices, fully defined arcs, deep layered motivations, and specific fears. The relationship matrix is comprehensive and consistent with individual profiles. Voice profiles are operable and specific enough for downstream audit. No kill switches triggered. No hard-gate violations. The character design achieves narrative depth: the antagonist 拉图尔 is a 'sincere believer in his own lies' rather than a cartoon villain, the买办 滕贵生 demonstrates self-colonization psychology, and the protagonist's arc from cynic to revolutionary is methodically grounded in specific traumatic events (阿莲's death, 老陈's death, 梵光's failure) rather than abstract moral awakening.
